items.title: Your car with Google built-in is about to get smarter, thanks to Gemini
items.content: Thanks to deep integrations with both your vehicle and your apps, Gemini in cars with Google built-in will help drivers do more safely while still focusing on the road.
items.contentSnippet: Thanks to deep integrations with both your vehicle and your apps, Gemini in cars with Google built-in will help drivers do more safely while still focusing on the road.

items.title: Check out the new ways to explore Route 66 on Google Maps.
items.content: In celebration of Route 66’s 100th anniversary, Google Maps is rolling out two new ways to help you explore it, virtually or IRL.
items.contentSnippet: In celebration of Route 66’s 100th anniversary, Google Maps is rolling out two new ways to help you explore it, virtually or IRL.

items.title: Preferred Sources is now available in all languages.
items.content: Preferred Sources is now rolling out globally in all supported languages, giving users more control over the news they see on Search.
items.contentSnippet: Preferred Sources is now rolling out globally in all supported languages, giving users more control over the news they see on Search.

items.title: Adapt your Shopping campaigns to modern Search with AI Max.
items.content: Built for the next generation of Search, AI Max for Shopping campaigns helps retailers reach shoppers the moment discovery begins.

items.title: Meet travelers in the moments that matter with Search Campaigns for Travel.

items.title: AI Max Turns 1 with new ways to steer performance and expansion to more advertisers
items.content: As AI Max turns 1, we’re helping you capture even more opportunities in the expanding Search universe.
items.contentSnippet: As AI Max turns 1, we’re helping you capture even more opportunities in the expanding Search universe.

name: Brandon Ervin
title: Director of Product Management, Google Ads

items.summary: AI Max迎来发布一周年，推出新方式引导广告效果并扩展至更多广告商，帮助用户在不断增长的搜索领域捕捉更多商业机会。

items.title: We’re donating Agent Payments Protocol to the FIDO Alliance to support the future of secure, agentic payments.

items.title: Expanding digital IDs in India and around the world

items.title: 8 Gemini tips for organizing your space (and life)
items.content: Organize your home and digital space with Gemini. Use AI-powered tips for cleaning schedules, inbox decluttering, seasonal chores.
items.contentSnippet: Organize your home and digital space with Gemini. Use AI-powered tips for cleaning schedules, inbox decluttering, seasonal chores.
